Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "3DTIMETREK-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "3D Time Trek.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $FE at $0328 (it doesn't use $E1 like some other games, as that causes the value of the TI variable at $A0-$A2 to be incorrectly modified, which this game relies on being correct). 3. Executes the RUN command to start the command to start the game program.
Note: The IF C=1 THEN LOAD "GR",1,1 on line 7 and IF C=2 THEN LOAD "CODE",1,1 on line 8 were REM'd out to stop the program trying to load the game files from tape as they are already in memory.
